entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A pathogen (Peronosclerospora sorghi) that causes serious economic losses in sorghum crops.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop affected by downy mildew.

entities.name: ECONOMIC LOSSES
entities.description: The financial impact caused by the downy mildew pathogen.

entities.name: BIOLOGY
entities.description: The biological characteristics of the downy mildew pathogen.

entities.name: EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the distribution and determinants of downy mildew.

entities.name: CONTROL
entities.description: Strategies and measures used to manage the downy mildew pathogen.

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the host plant to resist infection by downy mildew, suggested as the best control solution.
